items.title: Farioli vergeet met Porto titelstrijd te beslissen: 'Doen drie teams mee'
items.summary: Francesco Farioli zag maandagavond de zege in de topper tegen Sporting Portugal uit zijn handen glippen . De trainer van FC Porto moest toekijken hoe zijn ploeg in de tiende (!) minuut van de extra tijd een gelijkmaker moest slikken. En daardoor ligt de strijd om het kampioenschap nog steeds open.

items.summary: After an impressive start to life at Newcastle, what has happened to Nick Woltemade?

items.title: Vergelijking met Van Basten en lof van Gasperini voor Roma-sensatie Malen
items.summary: Donyell Malen (27) is goed uit de startblokken geschoten bij AS Roma. Maandagavond maakte hij twee doelpunten tegen Cagliari (2-0). Daardoor kwamen al gauw de vergelijkingen met Marco van Basten, maar trainer Gian Piero Gasperini ziet een andere grootheid uit het Italiaanse voetbal als betere vergelijking.

items.title: 'You love Kobbie' - Mainoo showing Amorim why so many do
items.summary: Why Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo is proving Ruben Amorim was wrong to keep ignoring him.

items.title: Fitz-Jim zag transfer afketsen: 'Het was te kort dag'
items.summary: Kian Fitz-Jim heeft een veelbewogen week achter de rug, zo vertelt hij in een interview op VI PRO . De 22-jarige middenvelder was op Deadline Day dicht bij een transfer naar het buitenland, maar was zondag belangrijk voor Ajax met zijn late gelijkmaker tegen AZ .

items.title: FC Twente-verdedigers zeer gewild, Ezeb ook weg bij FC Dordrecht
items.summary: Blijf via dit blog op de hoogte van alle transfers en transfergeruchten bij en rond clubs in de Eredivisie en de Keuken Kampioen Divisie. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in het buitenland .

items.title: Transfers Ajax: Weghorst met twee jaar vertraging alsnog naar Twente?
items.summary: VI volgt het transfernieuws bij Ajax op de voet, ook nu de winterse transferwindow gesloten is. De doelwitten van de Amsterdammers, duiding van de clubwatcher, of aandacht in buitenlandse media. We verzamelen alles hier.

items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo has decided to end his boycott of Al Nassr games, sources have told ESPN Brasil.

items.title: Laporta resigns as Barça president, will re-stand
items.summary: Joan Laporta has resigned as Barcelona president ahead of re-standing for the role when club members go to the polls on March 15.

items.title: Cazorla: 'LaLiga light years away from the PL'
items.summary: Santi Cazorla has taken a swipe at LaLiga after his team's league game at Rayo Vallecano on Saturday afternoon was postponed just hours before kickoff.

items.title: Berbatov: 'Wait and see' on Carrick as manager
items.summary: Former Manchester United striker Dimitar Berbatov has hailed the turnaround at Old Trafford under Michael Carrick but urged the club not to rush a decision on a permanent managerial role.

items.title: Klopp, Alonso, Guardiola: Predicting what happens to Europe's top managers this summer
items.summary: With the Real Madrid and Manchester United jobs up for grabs, one thing is for certain this summer: The world's best managers will be in high demand.

items.title: Middlesbrough sink Sheffield United and climb to Championship summit
items.summary: Middlesbrough took over at the top of the Championship as an impressive first-half performance secure a 2-1 victory at Sheffield United. Goals from Tommy Conway and Riley McGree during the opening 45 minutes proved to be crucial, taking Boro two points clear of Coventry at the top after a sixth successive win. Continue reading...

items.title: Rosenior 'not bothered' by David Brent and Inbetweeners comparisons
items.summary: Chelsea manager Liam Rosenior says he is not "bothered at all" by memes comparing him to tongue-in-cheek television characters.

items.title: Chelsea’s Liam Rosenior admits online mockery is affecting his family
items.summary: Head coach says he expected backlash after taking role I’m not a massive name and have a different character’ Liam Rosenior has opened up on the ridicule directed at him since he became Chelsea’s head coach, saying he expected the backlash and revealing it has affected his family. Speaking with honesty and positivity, the 41-year-old was keen to stress that he will not allow the discussion around his personality, looks and coaching background to stop him from doing his job. ­Rosenior has said previously that he knows “a lot of people in this country have been laughing at me” since his ­appointment as Enzo Maresca’s replacement last month. Continue reading...

items.title: Chelsea part company with head of women’s football in shock move
items.summary: Paul Green joined as assistant to Emma Hayes in 2013 Chelsea won 19 trophies during his 13 years at club Chelsea have announced the shock exit of their influential head of women’s football, Paul Green. Green joined Chelsea in 2013, recruited from Doncaster Rovers Belles by Emma Hayes to be her assistant manager. In the intervening years they formed a formidable ­partnership, sharing an office throughout, with Green an architect, alongside Hayes, of an ambitious blueprint that would take the women’s team to the top of English and European football. He was particularly involved in the club’s recruitment strategy alongside Hayes, masterminding a process that would have Chelsea operating three or four transfer windows ahead. Continue reading...

items.title: 'Didn't want the season to end like this' - Grealish has surgery
items.summary: Jack Grealish says he "didn't want the season to end like this" after confirming he has had surgery on a foot stress fracture.
